titleStmt.title: SII 22.273: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 273. (A.R. No. 273 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. VĪRARĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA—6th YEAR.

summary.p: This records a gift of 32 cows and a bull for the daily supply of an uḻakku of ghee for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirumāṟpēṟuḍaiyār, made by Tiruvaraṅgamuḍaiyāṉ Danmaparipālaṉ alias Rājadhirāja-Malaiyarāyaṉ son of Malaitāṅgi Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Malaiyarāyaṉ Munaiyadaraiyan of Tiruneḍumpiṟai in Naḍuvilmalai Perumūr-nāḍu a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉāka tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīvirarājendracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu naṭuvinmalaip perumur nāṭṭut tiruneṭumpiṟaiyil malaitāṅki kulottuṅkacoḻamalaiyarāyan muṉai yataraiyan makan tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tanmaparipālaṉāna Irājādhirāja malaiyarāyan Immaṇṭalattut tāmaṟkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭu Āḷuṭaiyār
tirumāṟ peṟuṭaiyāṟku vaitta tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku nāḷ 1- kku Irājakecariyāl ney Uḻakkāka munnūṟṟaṟupattaiñcukku ney toṇṇūṟṟoru nāḻi Uḻakkukku viṭṭa pacu muppattiraṇṭum Iṣapam 1- m Āka Uru muppattumuṉṟu maviyāṉa Ittanmam cantirātittavarai celvatāka vaittatu Itukku rakṣai panmāheśvarar
Digital edition of SII 22.273 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
